entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency and volume of crop production per unit of land.

entities.name: FOOD DEMAND
entities.description: The global requirement for food resulting from an increasing population.

entities.name: CROP PROTECTION METHODS
entities.description: Strategies and techniques used to safeguard crops from damage.

entities.name: CROP LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in agricultural output caused by pests and other stressors.

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Biological organisms that cause damage to cultivated crops.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
entities.description: A transformative technological tool used to reform crop protection and pest management.

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: A subset of AI that uses algorithms to enable precise pest detection and forecasting.

entities.name: DEEP LEARNING ALGORITHMS
entities.description: Advanced AI algorithms used for complex pattern recognition in crop protection.

entities.name: PEST DETECTION
entities.description: The use of AI to accurately identify the presence of pests.

entities.name: RISK ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The AI-driven process of evaluating the likelihood and impact of pest threats.

entities.name: MONITORING
entities.description: The continuous AI-enabled tracking of pest activity and crop health.

entities.name: FORECASTING
entities.description: The AI-driven prediction of future pest outbreaks.

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The total amount of crop produced per unit area.

entities.name: EXPERT SYSTEM
entities.description: An AI system that mimics human expert knowledge for crop management decisions.

entities.name: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM
entities.description: An AI-integrated system that provides farmers with timely and precise management decisions.

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The overall process of managing agricultural crops to enhance productivity.

entities.name: PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The strategic control of pests to minimize crop losses and ensure food security.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient food for the population.
